nasb.text: “How languishing is your heart,” declares the Lord God, “while you do all these things, the actions of a bold-faced harlot.

esv.text: “How sick is your heart, declares the Lord God, because you did all these things, the deeds of a brazen prostitute,

cnv.text: “‘你行的這一切事，簡直是任性無恥的妓女所為，可見你的意志是多麼的薄弱。這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: “‘主耶和华说，你的心败坏至极，简直就像不知羞耻的娼妓，
